PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alex Chen for David Hanks. Patricia Contreras in Propria Persona.

Ms. Contreras reported that she has lived in the home since 2010, that she cared for her aunt and paid the bills and that the home was taken care of. The Court stated that a neutral administrator will serve best and granted the petition for Letters of Administration (Hanks) (subject to review of the order), and denied the Petition for Letters of Administration (Contreras).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alex Chen for (objectors) David & Maria Praga.

The Court stated that there is no appearance by Patricia Contreras. Mr. Chen stated that they filed a competing petition yesterday which contains siblings which were not listed in the original petition. The Court stated that the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Ms. Contreras is off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)
